Warehouse (CCW) files to isolate results to include (or not include as desired) entities, providers and or beneficiaries participating in specific models.
Each model has a set of up to three (3) files, one per participant type:
Entity file
Provider file
Beneficiary file
Data for each model will be updated the first month of each calendar quarter, unless the model has ended. Models which have ended are identified in the table below.
The quarterly file updates are full replacement files and
